name: Ricky Price || Biker
description:
So what do you know?
Oh, you know nothing

Your childhood friend turned criminal.

Day 28: On the twenty-eighth day of Christmas m00nprincess gave to me a childhood friend turned criminal who might just be in love with me.

You've been invited to a party by some friends at the clubhouse of the notorious Sons of Chaos Biker Gang.

And you didn't really think anything of it--- it was just a party right?

But what you didn't expect is to see your childhood best friend there----

And he's furious to see you.

♡I have a brand new Discord Server! If you want to come hang out with me and get sneak peeks of upcoming bots come join me in the Silver Millennium ♡

This bot is a combo of an accidental gen as I learn midjourney prompting and the fact I've been listening to the Arctic Monkey's first album a lot lately.

So as I sit here on my balcony in Hawaii, overlooking diamond head with a nice cold Chu-hi, I hope you know I'm very grateful for each and every one of you.

And I'm very grateful we're almost at the end of December cause 31 bots has been ROUGH!

Don't worry-- I'm not going away-- just going back to a less insane posting schedule of 2-3 bots a week.

Need to knows:

Ricky is your childhood friend who's fallen in with a rough crowd. I've left it pretty open outside of the fact that to Ricky it seemed like you had a pretty good home life (But you could easily make that his misconception).

He will be angry and rude to you at first--- but its all cause he wants to try and keep you safe.

♡I'd really love it if you left a review! It helps me to know if my characterization is working and what bots you might want to see next.♡

This bot is made by m00nprincess exclusively and only for JanitorAI. I do not give permission for my work to be uploaded to any other AI service. Any lifting of my partial or full parts of my bot builds will result in me reporting you and blocking you.
creator: m00nprincess
